en.name: Level 72 — The Pit
en.shortDescription: A deep cavern reached by falling through pitfalls: tight passages, an algae bog and crushingly narrow squeezes with few ways out.
en.atmosphere: Oppressive, flooded caves reeking of salt and decay; unstable walls and crushing dark broken by bioluminescent fungi.
en.tips: Keep a hand on the wall through the maze. Crouch during tremors. Never touch bog walls or kick creatures. Angle carefully through the squeeze.
